title: ExtractedSignals
description: Output contract for the extraction agent: zero or more typed signals grounded in the source document. Empty array is valid and common.

direction.description: +1 = need rising / supply falling; -1 = the reverse

magnitude.description: Quantity stated IN THE TEXT (workers affected, days/week cut). Never inferred.

raw_excerpt.description: Verbatim span from the document that justifies this signal. If no quotable span exists, do not emit the signal.

geo_text.description: Place name as written in the document (e.g. 'Mount Vernon'). Geo-resolution to tract happens downstream, not in the agent.

observed_date_text.description: Date as written in the document, if any.
